headline: Is It Time To Reassess T-Mobile US (TMUS) After Recent Share Price Volatility?
summary: For investors wondering whether T-Mobile US at around US$198.17 per share still offers value or if the best days are already priced in, this article is designed to help frame that question clearly. The stock has been volatile recently, with a 4.9% gain over the last 7 days, a 7.4% decline over 30 days, and a 0.7% decline year to date. The 1 year return shows an 18.4% decline, compared with longer term 3 year and 5 year returns of 47.3% and 53.7% respectively. Recent coverage around T-Mobile...

headline: T-Mobile boasts of ‘industry-leading’ NPS score
summary: The company's  strategy to provide customers with the best network, value and experience is driving new and deepening customer relationships as well as outsized financial results, executives said.
